title: cotula cotuloides
intro: Cotula cotuloides, commonly known as the cotula or narrow-leaved cotula, is a small annual herb belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cotula cotuloides include relief from skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Cotula cotuloides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
